title: Avudaiyarkoil
tagline: Avudaiyarkoil — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Avudaiyarkoil is one of the blocks and Taluk in the Pudukkotai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Avudaiyarkoil is one of the blocks and Taluk in the Pudukkotai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The village has a temple named Tirupperunturai. It is about 14 kilometres (9 mi) South East of the Major town Aranthangi along State Highway 26 (SH 26), on the South bank of the Vellar River.

topPlaces.name: Tirupperunturai
topPlaces.description: Tirupperunthurai (also called the Athmanathaswamy temple) is located in Avudaiyarkoil village, near Aranthangi in the Pudukkottai district of Tamil Nadu. It was built in 10 century to honor Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Avadaiyarkoil taluk
topPlaces.description: Avadaiyarkoil taluk is a taluk of Pudukkottai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Avadaiyarkoil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avudaiyarkoil?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avudaiyarkoil is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avudaiyarkoil?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avudaiyarkoil at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avudaiyarkoil?
faq.a: Stays in Avudaiyarkoil start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avudaiyarkoil?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tirupperunturai, Avadaiyarkoil taluk, Irrumbaanadu, Adikesava Perumal Temple, Paramandur, Okkur, Pudukkottai.
